completion.completionMode: Single-turn read-only inspection with strict evidence-aware verification.
completion.doneCriteriaShape: Return a substantive final answer grounded in direct project inspection evidence.
completion.evidenceRequirement: Use successful read/search tool results for inspection-style claims.
completion.stopVsDoneDistinction: A provider stop is insufficient unless the answer is substantive and consistent with the observed tool results.

diagnostics.traceabilityExpectation: Keep inspection evidence and verifier outcomes traceable.
